changedModules: vc-frontend storefront (Cart UI), Marketing (via promotion-coupons consumption)

openManualItems.ask: Live verify A→B preset swap radio-button
PR #2269 removed /checkout/review page — out of JIRA AC scope; clarify with PR author

new.rule: When applyCoupon(code) is called with a code different from the currently applied coupon, the system MUST first call removeCartCoupon on the existing coupon before calling addCartCoupon for the new code. Cart MUST NOT hold two coupons simultaneously during this transition.
new.verify: Network trace shows removeCoupon mutation completes before addCoupon mutation fires; cart.coupons[] never contains 2 entries simultaneously.
new.violationSignal: Two coupons applied simultaneously; addCoupon fires before removeCoupon completes; cart.coupons[] has stale entry post-swap.
new.source: client-app/shared/cart/composables/useCoupon.ts in PR #2269 lines 23-43; JIRA VCST-4896 AC#4
